text: Niteme liboe lɛ gi Aya yɛ oboedoplɛɛ Yeremya apani aplɛ ɛ,
translated: The night came and the people of Aya were gathered together, Jeremiah spoke to them.

ref: Look at the birds in the sky! They don't plant or harvest. They don't even store grain in barns. Yet your Father in heaven takes care of them. Aren't you worth much more than birds?
text: Mledi liwɔ lɛ mɛ kudzɔʋi yɔ; kuʋíkpɛ bidɔ loo vini bidɔ kɔbla ní owle me, pɔ fɛ ɛ mlɔ Ɔka yɛ ní lifunu ne e izeedi kɔ aʋa. Mláŋa kedzi asani kɔ na a?
translated: What is the meaning of this; I do not understand it, I do not know what it means, I want to know what it means.  Is it a secret?

ref: On that day they will be told they are either innocent or guilty because of the things they have said. A Sign from Heaven (Mark
text: Lɛ ese linu si wɔ tutɔ wɔ eboe la biakɔ tsã litsi le ɔki wɔ, lɛ wɔ tutɔ wɔ eboe la biakɔ bu wɔ lipɔ.” Ɔsã nɔ badɔbasɛ batɔ ni Farisianɛatɔ beʋi i dɔni Yesu awla si ɔbitɛ linugutseboe
translated: The Pharisees, hearing that Jesus was teaching the people, came to him and said, "Why do you teach the people and break the tradition of the elders?"

ref: When the Son of Man appears, things will be just as they were when Noah lived.
text: Ɔnɔɛ Yebi ye kubaba ɛ, kwiaze ko ŋwisi nite gi lize ní Noa lipoe le me e.
translated: The name Yebi is a good name, it is a name that is given to a child born on a Friday.

ref: But Jesus did not say anything, and the governor was greatly amazed. The Death Sentence (Mark
text: Pɔ̀ Yesu obu liboeboe onu tɔɔ gi lítu kesea ɔʋadi ye kugyɔ ɔ. Pilato atsa kutsépia akí Yesu
translated: When Jesus was led away, he was wearing a crown of thorns, and they were mocking him, saying, "Hail, King of the Jews!" Pilate also had a sign written and put on the cross.
